title: OWI Argument Extraction Dataset
author: Zelch, Ines
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains arguments extracted from web pages collected in the OpenWebIndex OWI ( https://dashboard.ows.eu/ ). 
 The index data were searched for web pages related to 31 controversial topics from the  ArgKP dataset . From each web page, argumentative segments were extracted on sentence and paragraph level, applying an argument classification model ( github.com/UKPLab/acl2019-BERT-argument-classification ). The argumentative segments were then matched to suitable key points - high level argumentative statements that help to summarize the main arguments in a large collection. The key points were also taken from the ArgKP dataset.
